label: Telegram Bot
summary: Stores JavaScript bot code and runs a grammY bot in the background using the injected $BOT instance; agents should validate worker startup separately from the HTTP response.

configuration.code: JavaScript source that configures the injected $BOT grammY instance. Do not instantiate the bot or call $BOT.start(); the runtime does that automatically.
configuration.custom_data: Telegram bot runtime metadata. In practice this should include custom_data.token with the bot token. Invalid tokens cause worker startup failures and can auto-disable the endpoint after repeated retries.

agent_notes.startup_validation: A 200 HTTP response only confirms route handling. Real bot startup must be confirmed in worker logs.
agent_notes.failure_behavior: Repeated bot startup failures can auto-disable the endpoint.
agent_notes.seeded_apps: If the endpoint belongs to a seeded app such as demo, update the default app definition too or the next restart may restore previous metadata.
